title: hydrangea obtusifolia
intro: Hydrangea obtusifolia, also known as the roughleaf hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hydrangea obtusifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support kidney function, among others. Hydrangea obtusifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
